title: AI may spot deadly heart risk in a routine ECG - Fox News
summary_full: AI may spot deadly heart risk in a routine ECG  Fox NewsAn ECG biomarker for sudden cardiac death discovered with deep learning  NatureDoctors Thought It Was Asthma. A.I. Flagged a Serious Heart Problem.  The New York TimesPathway Labs Announces World's First FDA Clearance for Multicondition AI in Cardiology and Partnership with OpenEvidence  Business WireAn A.I. program found evidence of possible severe heart damage in the electrocardiogram of Louie Quiros, a 45-year-old caregiver and security guard who showed up at a Queens emergency room coughing up blood and finding it harder and harder to breath  facebook.com
